message:
feat: add --destroy-token for safe non-interactive re-init (GH#2497)

Adds a --destroy-token flag to bd init that enables safe non-interactive
re-initialization. In non-interactive mode, --force now requires either
--destroy-token=DESTROY-<prefix> for explicit opt-in or --quiet for
legacy (deprecated) bypass. This prevents agents from accidentally
destroying existing databases.

Co-Authored-By: matt wilkie <maphew@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
